团队经验知识中枢

团队经验知识库

统一查看 K8s 经验知识库 / OpenClaw 经验知识库 的采集、隐私、审批和沉淀状态。

可审批提案 29

当前能直接批准或拒绝的知识改动。

 隐私审批队列 16

含历史待确认；本次阻断 13。

 稳定页面 0

知识页 0 + 技能 0；同一主题会合并说明。

 质量阻断 0

断链、重复、过期和编译阻断统一在这里看。
当前结论 先处理 16 条隐私审批和 29 个可审批提案。稳定知识总量是 0，不是本次新增数。

从来源到入库的处理链路

这些数字按阶段展示，不是简单相加。点击阶段可以跳到明细或审批入口。

1 来源采集 131 来自 openclaw-answer-bot；这是原始条目，不是经验数量 2 隐私筛选 13 本次阻断 13；审批队列 16 3 经验提炼 9 9 个经验片段；86 个来源待二次提炼 4 提案审批 29 当前可审批 29；本次生成 30 5 稳定知识 0 稳定页面：知识页 0 + 技能 0；主题 0

知识库分布

每个知识库独立统计来源、隐私阻断、待提炼和稳定知识页，并展示当前筛选模式。

K8s 经验知识库 0 稳定页 · 来源 0 · 待提炼 0 · 隐私 0 k8s · allowlist
  • 保留 K8s 修复经验
  • 保留验证或升级边界
  • 拒绝纯问候
 OpenClaw 经验知识库 0 稳定页 · 来源 131 · 待提炼 55 · 隐私 13 openclaw · allowlist
  • 保留 OpenClaw 修复动作
  • 保留 OpenClaw 问答口径
  • 保留验证或升级边界
  • 拒绝纯问候

知识库筛选规则

配置来自 .praxisbase/config.yaml；allowlist 表示只有命中保留规则的内容进入提炼。

K8s 经验知识库k8s
画像
k8s
模式
allowlist
规则
  • keep_k8s_repair保留 K8s 修复经验
  • keep_verification_or_escalation保留验证或升级边界
  • reject_greeting_only拒绝纯问候
OpenClaw 经验知识库openclaw
画像
openclaw
模式
allowlist
规则
  • keep_openclaw_repair保留 OpenClaw 修复动作
  • keep_openclaw_qa_policy保留 OpenClaw 问答口径
  • keep_verification_or_escalation保留验证或升级边界
  • reject_greeting_only拒绝纯问候
术语速查
来源条目
OpenClaw 记忆或其他输入被切分后的处理单位；一个来源可能产生多个经验片段，也可能只作为证据。
经验片段
从来源中抽出的可复用修复经验，还没有变成稳定知识。
提案
AI 编译出的知识库改动草稿，审批通过并提升后才会写入 kb/ 或 skills/。
稳定知识
已经在 kb/ 或 skills/ 中的页面，Agent 检索时可以直接使用。

Lesson 候选

  1. Before starting slow work or work involving tools, network calls, or delegation dispatch, send a short acknowledgement first, then proceed with the slow operation. skill_ready / safe / agent-runtime, dispatch, network, tooling
    source-inventory://openclaw/.praxisbase/staging/experience-envelopes/experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-ae83a0ed6.json#src_openclaw_praxisbase-staging-experience-envelopes-experience-openclaw-answer-bot-sha256_json_0
  2. 在团队群聊场景，OpenClaw Q&A/维修机器人应仅在被直接 @、被显式调用，或消息清晰表达需要机器人介入时回复；否则保持静默或返回 no-response sentinel。 wiki_ready / safe
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/db942141c04813da000316c8bb03a726610a386f8c89e5184512d63912fbcbe9#L41-L44#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-6535eb38b_10 openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/0e92ce33a0e6f928264ccf3f028b41f1fa6b60260443a9c650956c393c679e09#L58-L58#privacy_release_experience_openclaw-answer-bot-sha256-6738918bd_13

待审核经验候选

AI 生成的 wiki 草稿正在等待审核。稳定的 kb/ 文件在提升前不会改变。

30

  1. 事件响应不能止于临时缓解

    当 OpenClaw 事故或长期故障的即时影响已被控制时，仍必须继续进行根因分析、制定跟进行动并跟踪到关闭；不得因为临时缓解生效就降低根因调查优先级。

    目标
    kb/decisions/incident-response-requires-rca-and-follow-up.md
    类型
    decision
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/affc243831d9884b3b1eb30194dd8941838d7bcbedeacd2d1121e0583a01e17a#L9-L13
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.63
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来自单条培训类材料，未提供具体 OpenClaw 事故案例、命令、系统组件或验证输出。; 本页提炼为通用事件响应决策规则，适合作为操作原则，不应替代具体故障的维修步骤或技术诊断手册。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.72; semantic_reason:The page has durable value and captures a reusable incident-response rule: temporary mitigation must not replace RCA, follow-up actions, and long-running issue tracking. The cited PraxisBase provenance directly supports that core lesson. However, the page expands a single training excerpt into a broader team-level operating policy with detailed steps, closure criteria, ownership expectations, and OpenClaw-specific applicability that are only partially evidenced. The deterministic gate also flags generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope. It should receive human review and revision before promotion rather than being accepted as-is.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.72 · The page has durable value and captures a reusable incident-response rule: temporary mitigation must not replace RCA, follow-up actions, and long-running issue tracking. The cited PraxisBase provenance directly supports that core lesson. However, the page expands a single training excerpt into a broader team-level operating policy with detailed steps, closure criteria, ownership expectations, and OpenClaw-specific applicability that are only partially evidenced. The deterministic gate also flags generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope. It should receive human review and revision before promotion rather than being accepted as-is.

  2. 沙箱浏览器无法访问内部测试环境时先判定网络前置条件

    当沙箱浏览器无法打开内部测试环境，而具备内部网络访问权限的环境可以访问时，应优先判定为运行环境缺少内部网络连通性，而不是应用缺陷。

    目标
    kb/decisions/sandboxed-browser-internal-test-network-prerequisite.md
    类型
    decision
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/8e67df0474158324d567a04e84259a42f270e98d526843e017885e03d2717604#L14-L14
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.78
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源只有一条，适合作为访问环境分流规则，但不应替代具体网络诊断。; 未提供具体 URL、命令或错误码；本文避免写入任何内部地址或敏感访问细节。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.76; semantic_reason:The page captures a reusable and actionable triage decision: if a sandboxed browser cannot reach an internal test environment but an environment with internal network access can, classify it as an environment/access prerequisite before escalating as an application defect. The included provenance directly supports the central claim, and the checklist-style procedure has long-term agent utility. However, the evidence base is a single source excerpt, while the page expands into broader escalation boundaries and team-scope guidance. The deterministic gate also flagged generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope. It should receive human review or a tightening revision before promotion.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.76 · The page captures a reusable and actionable triage decision: if a sandboxed browser cannot reach an internal test environment but an environment with internal network access can, classify it as an environment/access prerequisite before escalating as an application defect. The included provenance directly supports the central claim, and the checklist-style procedure has long-term agent utility. However, the evidence base is a single source excerpt, while the page expands into broader escalation boundaries and team-scope guidance. The deterministic gate also flagged generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope. It should receive human review or a tightening revision before promotion.

  3. 在现有对话链中优先使用线程感知回复

    当用户在已有问题或排障链路中继续追问时，机器人应优先将回答附加到原始会话线程，避免新开孤立回复，以保持上下文、审阅连续性和后续追踪清晰。

    目标
    kb/decisions/thread-aware-replies-in-existing-conversations.md
    类型
    decision
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/0e92ce33a0e6f928264ccf3f028b41f1fa6b60260443a9c650956c393c679e09#L54-L54
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.63
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源只有一条，且为团队操作规范更新；没有具体 OpenClaw 硬件故障、命令或维修验证结果。; 该页面适合作为支持机器人回复路由规则，不应被误用为设备维修步骤。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.72; semantic_reason:The page captures a reusable and actionable team decision: follow-up answers in an existing conversation should use thread-aware replies to preserve review continuity. The provided PraxisBase provenance directly supports that central rule, but only as a single short excerpt; several detailed scenarios, verification checks, and OpenClaw-specific framing are extrapolated beyond the cited evidence. Because the scope is team-level and the deterministic gate requires human review for generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope, it should not be promoted automatically. It is likely useful after human confirmation and cleanup of the generic Agent Use boilerplate.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.72 · The page captures a reusable and actionable team decision: follow-up answers in an existing conversation should use thread-aware replies to preserve review continuity. The provided PraxisBase provenance directly supports that central rule, but only as a single short excerpt; several detailed scenarios, verification checks, and OpenClaw-specific framing are extrapolated beyond the cited evidence. Because the scope is team-level and the deterministic gate requires human review for generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope, it should not be promoted automatically. It is likely useful after human confirmation and cleanup of the generic Agent Use boilerplate.

  4. 界面评审：避免在侧边或底部使用装饰线

    记录一条可复用的 UI 偏好：在希望界面更简洁、减少装饰感的场景中，避免沿侧边或底部添加纯装饰性线条。

    目标
    kb/decisions/ui-avoid-decorative-edge-lines.md
    类型
    decision
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/b62c9fa15b3e0a157401ea147eb48780e09a4ee53a0eac41a75fef148e5aa3db#L16-L16
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.63
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据仅包含一条 UI 偏好记录，未提供具体产品界面、截图、失败案例或验证结果。; 该决策适合用于视觉简化评审，不应覆盖具有功能性、可访问性或品牌规范要求的边缘线。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.7; semantic_reason:The page captures a reusable UI decision with clear practical guidance: avoid purely decorative side or bottom edge lines unless they serve an explicit function. The cited provenance directly supports the core preference, so the item has long-term agent value for future UI reviews. However, the support is thin: a single source excerpt backs only the general preference, while the page adds broader exceptions, verification checks, and generic best-practice framing that are not explicitly evidenced. The deterministic gate also requires human review due to low confidence, generic applicability, non-specific action, and team scope. This should not be rejected, but it should receive human validation or revision before promotion.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.7 · The page captures a reusable UI decision with clear practical guidance: avoid purely decorative side or bottom edge lines unless they serve an explicit function. The cited provenance directly supports the core preference, so the item has long-term agent value for future UI reviews. However, the support is thin: a single source excerpt backs only the general preference, while the page adds broader exceptions, verification checks, and generic best-practice framing that are not explicitly evidenced. The deterministic gate also requires human review due to low confidence, generic applicability, non-specific action, and team scope. This should not be rejected, but it should receive human validation or revision before promotion.

  5. 群消息疑似沙箱、机器人或实例宕机时的固定触发规则

    当群消息明确表达沙箱、机器人或实例可能宕机、无响应或不可用时，机器人应介入；触发依据应是通用故障语义，而不是具体环境名称或细节。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/added-a-fixed-trigger-scenario-for-failure-like-group-messages-indicating-a.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/cb0565346fdc853fc4f1db8e3568bf7c8ae2247cb009ed8b59691027b6d71f1a#L24-L24
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.78
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源只有一条，且未提供具体命令级验证方法；本页适合作为触发/路由规则，不应扩展为具体实例修复流程。; 原始材料未包含实际环境名称或私密凭据；输出避免加入未经证实的环境细节。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:revise; semantic_score:0.72; semantic_reason:The page captures a reusable and actionable rule: intervene on group messages only when generic outage or non-response semantics are present, not merely because sandbox, bot, or instance keywords appear. The single provenance excerpt directly supports the central claim, but support is narrow and does not substantiate all examples and operational guidance. The page also contains generated artifacts in the Agent Use section, including repeated/truncated bullets and an irrelevant generic verification instruction. It should be revised before promotion, but it has clear long-term agent value once cleaned.; semantic_review:revise
    Semantic review
    revise · score 0.72 · The page captures a reusable and actionable rule: intervene on group messages only when generic outage or non-response semantics are present, not merely because sandbox, bot, or instance keywords appear. The single provenance excerpt directly supports the central claim, but support is narrow and does not substantiate all examples and operational guidance. The page also contains generated artifacts in the Agent Use section, including repeated/truncated bullets and an irrelevant generic verification instruction. It should be revised before promotion, but it has clear long-term agent value once cleaned.

  6. 实例停止状态排查：优先看生命周期事件和上一轮容器日志

    当 bot 或服务实例进入 stopped 状态时，优先检查最近生命周期事件与 prior/previous container logs，用于区分资源限制、健康检查失败、空闲缩容、节点驱逐等基础设施原因与应用进程崩溃。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/bot-service-stopped-lifecycle-events-previous-logs.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/e0d8bd780bd4d7d0acc94dd3de06a1b295e0fdc6c94b65046de2633bcc0a8c53#L26-L26
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.63
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源较少，仅支持通用排查规则；未提供具体平台命令、产品版本或已验证修复动作。; 页面避免假定唯一根因，定位为 stopped 状态的取证与分流指导。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:revise; semantic_score:0.68; semantic_reason:The page captures a durable and reusable diagnostic lesson: when an instance is stopped, compare lifecycle events with prior container logs before attributing cause. This is actionable enough to help future agents avoid premature conclusions and is supported by the cited provenance excerpt at a high level. However, the candidate over-expands from a single source line into several specific decision branches without additional provenance, is categorized as a known fix despite being a triage playbook, and contains generic boilerplate verification language. It should be revised with stronger PraxisBase-backed evidence, concrete OpenClaw-specific retrieval steps, and more accurate page kind/framing before promotion.; semantic_review:revise
    Semantic review
    revise · score 0.68 · The page captures a durable and reusable diagnostic lesson: when an instance is stopped, compare lifecycle events with prior container logs before attributing cause. This is actionable enough to help future agents avoid premature conclusions and is supported by the cited provenance excerpt at a high level. However, the candidate over-expands from a single source line into several specific decision branches without additional provenance, is categorized as a known fix despite being a triage playbook, and contains generic boilerplate verification language. It should be revised with stronger PraxisBase-backed evidence, concrete OpenClaw-specific retrieval steps, and more accurate page kind/framing before promotion.

  7. 群聊中机器人无响应：先区分未触发、会话卡住与模型输出失败

    当用户反馈聊天平台机器人“没收到消息”或“无响应”时，不要直接判定为消息接收链路完全故障。已观察到至少一种情况是群聊触发条件未满足，例如未显式 @ 机器人。后续排查应先区分：触发条件未命中、会话卡住、模型输出失败。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/chat-bot-group-no-response-trigger-vs-stuck-vs-model-output.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/578c93fed49000856bedd6f4509320f98bfd5689fa2a77d8b6e288ff14dc4d94#L10-L10
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.63
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据仅覆盖一个观察案例，不能证明所有群聊无响应都由未 @ 或触发条件导致。; 缺少具体平台、日志字段、命令和配置项名称；本文只能作为排查顺序和分类规则使用。; 不要在没有验证的情况下把会话卡住或模型输出失败误判为触发条件问题。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.72; semantic_reason:The page has reusable long-term value as a triage heuristic for group-chat bot no-response reports, and its central lesson is supported by the cited PraxisBase source excerpt. However, it expands a single source line into a broader diagnostic procedure with some unsupported implementation-specific checks. Because the deterministic gate flags low confidence, generic applicability, non-specific action, and team/global scope, it should receive human review or revision before promotion rather than being promoted directly.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.72 · The page has reusable long-term value as a triage heuristic for group-chat bot no-response reports, and its central lesson is supported by the cited PraxisBase source excerpt. However, it expands a single source line into a broader diagnostic procedure with some unsupported implementation-specific checks. Because the deterministic gate flags low confidence, generic applicability, non-specific action, and team/global scope, it should receive human review or revision before promotion rather than being promoted directly.

  8. 协作文档创建前必须确认已登录会话

    当用户要求创建协作文档但授权登录未成功时，不要继续创建流程。应先确认存在有效的已认证会话；若等待授权后仍未建立会话，应停止操作并引导用户重新完成登录或转人工处理。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/collaborative-document-auth-session-required.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/f3544b734e702d241ea5feb3736e4237030617d2d5df62a99d4d4fb594989f76#L13-L13
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.63
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源只有一条，未提供具体产品、接口名称或命令，因此本页保留为通用操作规则。; 原始授权细节已被遮蔽；不要记录或复用任何登录凭据、令牌、Cookie 或授权头。; 不应把等待授权完成误判为登录成功，必须以可验证会话状态作为继续条件。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.68; semantic_reason:The page captures a durable and actionable lesson: do not proceed with collaborative document creation until an active authenticated session is confirmed, and waiting for authorization is not equivalent to successful login. This is reusable for future agents and is supported by the provided provenance excerpt at a high level. However, the body expands a single-line source into a detailed operating procedure, verification checklist, and escalation policy that are only partially evidenced. The deterministic gate also flags generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope. Human review or revision is needed before promotion, ideally by narrowing the page to the supported lesson or adding additional provenance-bearing evidence.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.68 · The page captures a durable and actionable lesson: do not proceed with collaborative document creation until an active authenticated session is confirmed, and waiting for authorization is not equivalent to successful login. This is reusable for future agents and is supported by the provided provenance excerpt at a high level. However, the body expands a single-line source into a detailed operating procedure, verification checklist, and escalation policy that are only partially evidenced. The deterministic gate also flags generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope. Human review or revision is needed before promotion, ideally by narrowing the page to the supported lesson or adding additional provenance-bearing evidence.

  9. 模型选择命令会跨会话持久生效

    当观察到模型选择命令在后续对话或重启后仍然生效时，不要按“仅当前会话临时开关”处理；应视为持久配置变更，并在排障、回滚和交接中明确检查当前有效模型。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/model-selection-command-persists.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/8c351e4b90f57741f7851c6edb2b4c40a799566267c538a9b94fe8e398f04417#L6-L6
    来源数
    1
    置信度
    0.63
    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源较少，仅有一条观察；不同部署环境中的模型选择命令持久化机制可能不同。; 未提供具体命令名称、配置路径或状态查看命令，因此本文只给出操作规则与验证边界，不包含精确恢复命令。; 不要把本页扩展为所有系统的通用事实；应结合当前 OpenClaw 部署的实际配置界面或命令进行确认。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.72; semantic_reason:The page captures a reusable operational lesson: a model-selection command may persist beyond a session and should be treated as durable configuration. It is actionable and useful for future troubleshooting, especially for model drift, cost, latency, or behavior changes. However, the evidence is only a single provenance-bearing excerpt and does not identify the exact command, configuration mechanism, or affected product boundary. The proposed team scope is broader than the evidence clearly supports, and the deterministic gate already requires human review for generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope. Recommend human review or revision before promotion.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.72 · The page captures a reusable operational lesson: a model-selection command may persist beyond a session and should be treated as durable configuration. It is actionable and useful for future troubleshooting, especially for model drift, cost, latency, or behavior changes. However, the evidence is only a single provenance-bearing excerpt and does not identify the exact command, configuration mechanism, or affected product boundary. The proposed team scope is broader than the evidence clearly supports, and the deterministic gate already requires human review for generic applicability, non-specific action, low confidence, and team/global scope. Recommend human review or revision before promotion.

  10. 切换模型后出现意外模型切换或上下文错误

    当用户在切换不同模型后反馈模型意外变化、模型选择未按预期保持，或出现相关上下文处理错误时，建议让用户再次切换模型，并说明这是已知的跨模型切换上下文处理问题，未来版本计划修复。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/model-switch-context-handling-issue.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team

    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源仅一条，未包含具体产品界面路径、命令或可量化验证结果。; 修复时间只能表述为未来版本计划修复，不应承诺具体发布日期。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.72; semantic_reason:The page provides reusable and actionable support guidance for a known model-switching/context-handling issue, and the cited provenance directly supports the main recommendation: ask the user to switch models again and explain that the issue is known and planned for a future fix. However, the support is only partial because it relies on one short source excerpt, the candidate confidence is low, and the deterministic gate requires human review for broad team-scope applicability and non-specificity. It should not be promoted automatically, but it has enough long-term agent value to preserve for human triage or revision rather than reject.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.72 · The page provides reusable and actionable support guidance for a known model-switching/context-handling issue, and the cited provenance directly supports the main recommendation: ask the user to switch models again and explain that the issue is known and planned for a future fix. However, the support is only partial because it relies on one short source excerpt, the candidate confidence is low, and the deterministic gate requires human review for broad team-scope applicability and non-specificity. It should not be promoted automatically, but it has enough long-term agent value to preserve for human triage or revision rather than reject.

  11. 计划任务指向主会话并使用 system-event 载荷时校验失败

    当计划任务配置为投递到 main session 且使用 system-event payload 时，可能因框架持久化了字面占位符而非解析后的主会话标识导致校验失败。已验证的规避方式是改为目标隔离会话，并使用 agent-turn 风格载荷，同时显式配置 delivery。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/scheduled-jobs-main-session-system-event-validation-failure.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源

    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源数量为 1，缺少具体错误文本、配置字段名和命令级验证结果；页面应作为已验证规避方案使用，而非完整根因修复说明。; 未包含原始配置样例，避免误复制可能含有环境标识的私有配置。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.76; semantic_reason:The page captures a reusable known failure mode and workaround for scheduled jobs targeting the main session with system-event payloads, and it is supported by a provenance-bearing PraxisBase source excerpt with hash. It is not a run report or raw copy, and the guidance is likely useful to future agents. However, evidence support is only partial because it relies on one excerpt, and the deterministic gate requires human review due to low confidence, team/global scope, generic applicability, and somewhat non-specific action details. It should not be promoted automatically, but it is a reasonable candidate for human validation or revision with more concrete configuration details and additional provenance if available.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.76 · The page captures a reusable known failure mode and workaround for scheduled jobs targeting the main session with system-event payloads, and it is supported by a provenance-bearing PraxisBase source excerpt with hash. It is not a run report or raw copy, and the guidance is likely useful to future agents. However, evidence support is only partial because it relies on one excerpt, and the deterministic gate requires human review due to low confidence, team/global scope, generic applicability, and somewhat non-specific action details. It should not be promoted automatically, but it is a reasonable candidate for human validation or revision with more concrete configuration details and additional provenance if available.

  12. 团队聊天中 slash 命令不可用时改用直聊或提及输入

    当团队聊天环境中的 slash 命令无法触发机器人时，优先判断是否为平台管理控制台的命令注册问题，而不是直接归因于 bot 运行时故障。可验证的临时处理方式是改用机器人直聊，或在群聊中 @ 提及机器人并使用自然语言输入。

    目标
    kb/known-fixes/team-chat-slash-command-registration-workaround.md
    类型
    known_fix
    范围
    team
    来源
    openclaw://answer-bot/pm.sqlite/chunks/e0d8bd780bd4d7d0acc94dd3de06a1b295e0fdc6c94b65046de2633bcc0a8c53#L28-L28

    审核原因
    new_canonical_topic
    建议
    edit
    风险提示
    证据来源只有一条，且未提供具体平台名称、命令名称或管理控制台检查步骤；因此本文只保留通用操作规则和绕行方案。; 未包含原始聊天内容、凭据、令牌、cookie、认证头或私钥。; quality_human_required:generic_applicability; quality_human_required:non_specific_action; quality_human_required:low_confidence; quality_human_required:team_or_global_scope; semantic_review:needs_human; semantic_score:0.7; semantic_reason:The page captures a plausible, reusable known fix: do not assume bot runtime failure when slash commands fail, and use direct chat or mention-based natural language as a workaround while checking command registration. It is coherent and actionable, with provenance that supports the core claim. However, support is thin, confidence is low, and the deterministic gate requires human review because the guidance is somewhat generic and team-scoped. It should not be promoted automatically without human confirmation or stronger PraxisBase provenance.; semantic_review:needs_human
    Semantic review
    needs_human · score 0.7 · The page captures a plausible, reusable known fix: do not assume bot runtime failure when slash commands fail, and use direct chat or mention-based natural language as a workaround while checking command registration. It is coherent and actionable, with provenance that supports the core claim. However, support is thin, confidence is low, and the deterministic gate requires human review because the guidance is somewhat generic and team-scoped. It should not be promoted automatically without human confirmation or stronger PraxisBase provenance.
praxisbase review --auto praxisbase promote --auto praxisbase wiki build-site --json
